scripts.build: pnpm --filter @qdesigner/contracts build && pnpm --filter @qdesigner/questionnaire-core build && pnpm --filter @qdesigner/scripting-engine build && pnpm --filter @qdesigner/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @qdesigner/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @qdesigner/contracts build && pnpm --filter @qdesigner/questionnaire-core build && pnpm --filter @qdesigner/scripting-engine build
scripts.contracts:check: pnpm contracts:generate && git diff --exit-code -- packages/contracts/openapi/openapi.json packages/contracts/src/generated
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm check && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm contracts:check && pnpm server:fmt && pnpm server:clippy && pnpm server:test
